message:
fix(fr-runtime): CONFIG GET emits RESP3 Map type when protocol_version=3 [bd-frankenredis-9itc partial]

Upstream config.c::configGetCommand uses addReplyMapLen for RESP3
clients. fr's handle_config_get always returned an Array. Convert
the alternating-k/v collected entries into RespFrame::Map(Some)
when session.resp_protocol_version == 3.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
